content: Phase 3A: RBAC expansion - roles, permissions, role-based UI gating
Phase 3B: CRM Guest Intelligence Layer - computed fields + guest summary cards
Phase 3C: Loyalty Automation - tiers, auto-earn, progress bar, gamification
Phase 4A: Connector Framework + Stubs (WhatsApp, Instagram, Google Reviews, TripAdvisor)
Phase 4B: Reviews Module (list, sentiment, AI reply, manual publish)
Phase 4C: Offers + Mock Payments + Reservations flow
Phase 4D: Enhanced Dashboard (revenue charts, review sentiment, loyalty KPIs)
